title: Paws At You
description: A mod to let you pet mobs and other players!
body:
A mod to let you pet mobs and other players!

The petting keybind is set to `V` by default. Sneak + right click also works to pet players, but not other entities. 
The keybind works on all entities (but not armour stands or similar, all `extends LivingEntity` work for the nerds)

Works with Sinytra Connector

![Screenshot of a player petting another player](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ueZ377XT/images/412bf0a10222dd19ebb1cbf67e013828fe9658f9.png)
